# SwanLab

> SwanLab is an open-source, lightweight AI model training tracking and visualization tool. It provides a platform for tracking, recording, comparing, and collaborating on machine learning experiments, with both cloud and self-hosted deployment options.

## What SwanLab Can Do

- **Experiment Tracking**: Integrate into ML pipelines to track metrics, hyperparameters, and metadata in real time.
- **Training Visualization**: Intuitive UI with line charts, media viewers, 3D point clouds, custom ECharts, and more.
- **Hyperparameter Logging**: Record config dictionaries (or YAML/JSON files) alongside each experiment run.
- **Media Logging**: Log images, audio, video, text (with Markdown), 3D point clouds, and biochemical molecules.
- **Automatic Background Logging**: Captures hardware environment, Git info, Python packages, and directory structure automatically.
- **Hardware Monitoring**: Real-time tracking of CPU, GPU (NVIDIA, AMD, MetaX, MooreThread), NPU (Ascend), MLU (Cambricon), XPU (KunlunX), memory, disk, and network.
- **Experiment Comparison**: Compare hyperparameters and metrics across runs via tables and overlaid charts.
- **Resume Training**: Continue logging to an existing experiment after interruption or completion.
- **Distributed Training**: Shared parallel mode allows multiple processes to upload metrics to the same experiment simultaneously.
- **Multi-User Collaboration**: Sync experiments in real time, share persistent URLs, and manage experiments within organizations.
- **Self-Hosting**: Community edition supports offline/private dashboards deployable via Docker or Kubernetes.
- **Framework Integrations**: 40+ integrations including PyTorch, HuggingFace Transformers, LLaMA Factory, Ultralytics, MMDetection, Stable Baselines3, veRL, XGBoost, LightGBM, TensorBoard, Weights & Biases, MLflow, OpenAI, and more.
- **Plugin Extensions**: Extend with notification plugins (Lark, Slack, Email) and data-export plugins (CSV logger).
- **Open API / Python SDK**: Programmatically query workspaces, projects, experiments, metrics, and summaries.
- **CLI Tools**: Login, mode switching, offline board, log conversion, and sync commands.

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/general/quick-start.html): Install and run your first tracked experiment in 5 minutes.
- [What is SwanLab](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/general/what-is-swanlab.html): Full overview of features and comparisons with TensorBoard and Weights & Biases.

## Python SDK API Reference

- [swanlab.init](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-init.html): Initialize an experiment run (project, config, mode, resume, parallel, etc.).
- [swanlab.log](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-log.html): Log scalar metrics and media data to the current run.
- [swanlab.Image](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-Image.html): Wrap image data (file path, numpy array, or PIL image) for logging.
- [swanlab.Audio](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-Audio.html): Wrap audio data for logging.
- [swanlab.Text](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-Text.html): Wrap text (with optional Markdown rendering) for logging.
- [swanlab.Video](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-video.html): Wrap video data for logging.
- [swanlab.ECharts](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-echarts.html): Log custom Apache ECharts visualizations (bar, scatter, pie, heatmap, radar, etc.).
- [swanlab.Object3D](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-object3d.html): Log 3D point cloud data.
- [swanlab.Molecule](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-molecule.html): Log biochemical molecule structures.
- [swanlab.pr_curve](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-pr_curve.html): Log precision-recall curves.
- [swanlab.roc_curve](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-roc_curve.html): Log ROC curves.
- [swanlab.confusion_matrix](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-confusion_matrix.html): Log confusion matrices.
- [swanlab.login](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-login.html): Authenticate programmatically with an API key.
- [swanlab.Api (OpenAPI)](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-api.html): Query and manage workspaces, projects, experiments, and metrics via Python.
- [swanlab.Settings](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-settings.html): Configure SDK-level settings.
- [swanlab.run](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-run.html): The SwanLabRun object returned by `swanlab.init`.
- [swanlab.convert](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-converter.html): Convert TensorBoard / MLflow / W&B logs to SwanLab format.
- [swanlab.sync_wandb](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-sync-wandb.html): Sync Weights & Biases runs into SwanLab.
- [Integration helpers](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/py-integration.html): Callback utilities for framework integrations.

## CLI Reference

- [swanlab login](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-login.html): Log in to SwanLab cloud.
- [swanlab logout](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-logout.html): Log out of SwanLab cloud.
- [swanlab watch](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-watch.html): Launch the offline experiment dashboard.
- [swanlab sync](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-sync.html): Sync local logs to SwanLab cloud or a private deployment.
- [swanlab convert](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-convert.html): Convert external log files to SwanLab projects.
- [swanlab local](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-local.html): Switch SDK to local mode.
- [swanlab online](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-online.html): Switch SDK to cloud mode.
- [swanlab offline](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-offline.html): Switch SDK to offline mode.
- [swanlab disabled](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/cli-swanlab-disabled.html): Disable SwanLab logging entirely.
- [Environment Variables](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/api/environment-variable.html): All supported environment variables.

## Experiment Tracking Guides

- [Create an Experiment](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/create-experiment.html)
- [Log Metrics](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/log-experiment-metric.html)
- [Log Media (Images, Audio, Text, Video)](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/log-media.html)
- [Log Custom Charts (ECharts)](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/log-custom-chart.html)
- [System Hardware Monitoring](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/system-monitor.html)
- [Resume an Experiment](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/resume-experiment.html)
- [Distributed Training Logging](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/log-distributed-training.html)
- [Experiment Grouping](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/grouping.html)
- [Set Experiment Config](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/set-experiment-config.html)
- [Experiment Comparison](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/view-result.html)
- [Jupyter Notebook Support](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/jupyter-notebook.html)
- [Use OpenAPI](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/experiment_track/use-openapi.html)

## Framework Integrations

- [PyTorch](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-pytorch.html)
- [HuggingFace Transformers](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-huggingface-transformers.html)
- [HuggingFace Accelerate](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-huggingface-accelerate.html)
- [HuggingFace TRL](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-huggingface-trl.html)
- [PyTorch Lightning](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-pytorch-lightning.html)
- [LLaMA Factory](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-llama-factory.html)
- [Modelscope Swift](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-swift.html)
- [Ultralytics (YOLO)](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-ultralytics.html)
- [MMEngine / MMDetection / MMSegmentation](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-mmengine.html)
- [Stable Baselines3](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-sb3.html)
- [veRL](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-verl.html)
- [EasyR1](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-easyr1.html)
- [Keras](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-keras.html)
- [XGBoost](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-xgboost.html)
- [LightGBM](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-lightgbm.html)
- [MLX-LM](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-mlx-lm.html)
- [TensorBoard (sync)](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-tensorboard.html)
- [Weights & Biases (sync)](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-wandb.html)
- [MLflow (sync)](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-mlflow.html)
- [OpenAI](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/integration-openai.html)
- [All integrations](https://docs.swanlab.cn/en/guide_cloud/integration/index.html)
